positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~attend_engaged(bonnie)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~student(bonnie)).

cnf(u33,axiom,
    chaperone(X0) | perform(X0)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~perform(bonnie)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    inactive_disinterested(X0) | perform(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~inactive_disinterested(X0) | chaperone(X0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    ~perform(X0) | attend_engaged(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~student(X0) | ~chaperone(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define aspiring(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
